## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## 📱 Environment

- **App Build**: [e.g., debug, release]

Paste relevant logcat output or server logs here
